text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text: Books are spectacular. Wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Fiction, nonfiction, even lexicons... Knowledge is
sustenance, the true phronesis in life.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
A person hiding their lack of wisdom behind
flowery language is equivalent to vanitas
vanitatum.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
To reveal one's truest self, one need only wear
the garb of truth itself.
